content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 24 saw significant expansion of the elizaOS ecosystem, headlined by the integration of the NEAR AI inference provider, major advancements in cloud identity and wallet infrastructure, and robust improvements to agent safety and planner reliability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Inference and Cloud Infrastructure**
*   Added the NEAR AI inference provider plugin, enabling OpenAI-compatible model discovery and configuration ([#7883](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7883)).
*   Implemented ERC-8004 identity registration endpoints and a TypeScript client for Eliza Cloud agents ([#7937](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7937)).
*   Enhanced cloud wallet proxy logic to resolve steward agent IDs correctly and added fallback support for unmapped wallet proxies ([#7933](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7933), [#7934](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7934)).
*   Updated cloud-api health probes to use Redis heartbeats and prepared cloud-shared layers for the `elizacloud.ai` rebrand ([#7899](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7899), [#7896](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7896)).

**Agent Core and Safety Improvements**
*   Bound runaway tool-argument validation loops and restored evaluator message precedence to prevent planner regressions ([#7924](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7924), [#7897](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7897)).
*   Refactored response-handler evaluators to use prompt-rule contracts, improving context preservation and preventing phantom action claims ([#7931](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7931), [#7923](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7923)).
*   Fixed vision dependency installation issues in non-TTY environments ([#7941](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7941)).

**OS and Supply Chain Security**
*   Restored the `milady-tails` variant and cleaned up stale configuration fragments ([#7936](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7936), [#7926](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7926)).
*   Enhanced release integrity by minting SLSA build provenance for ISO, VM, and Debian artifacts, and attaching SPDX SBOMs to ISO releases ([#7908](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7908), [#7907](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7907), [#7906](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7906), [#7902](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7902)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Safety & Orchestration:** [#7945](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7945), [#7944](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7944), [#7943](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7943), [#7942](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7942).
*   **Cloud & Infrastructure:** [#7940](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7940), [#7932](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7932), [#7927](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7927), [#7921](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7921).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Safety Scaffold Discussion**
*   [#7922](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7922): Closed due to incorrect GitHub identity usage; re-filed as [#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925).

## NEW ISSUES

**Community Plugins**
*   [#7938](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7938): Proposal for `plugin-prflght`, a Solana transaction firewall for DeFi agents.
*   [#7939](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7939): Proposal for `plugin-gblin`, a treasury management plugin for Base mainnet.

**Planner Quality & Safety**
*   [#7935](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7935): Addressed planner SHELL-fallback issues and sub-agent metadata leaks.
*   [#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925): Discussion on implementing a default safety scaffold for high-stakes personal-crisis topics.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

*   **[#7935](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7935) Planner quality:** This issue tracked two major failures: planner SHELL-fallback loops and sub-agent metadata leaks in user prose. Recent updates confirm that [#7942](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7942) resolved the SHELL-fallback cost/timeout issues, while [#7943](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7943) addresses the sub-agent routing-kind banner leak. The issue is nearing resolution as these fixes are integrated.
*   **[#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925) Safety scaffold for personal-crisis topics:** Following the discussion on agent responses to personal crises, a framework-default rule was implemented via [#7944](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7944). The contributor notes that this provides a structured deferral to qualified professionals, with an override clause available for specific character deployments.
